content.en:
The soldiers of the undead legion here have basically seen Ye Tian, because Ye Tian had ridden this teleportation stone gate more than ten years ago, and they had a more momentary impression.

To this day, although Ye Tian is still at the emperor level, his aura is much stronger than at the beginning.

What's more critical is that Ye Tian actually has some more guards by his side.

"Galaxy-level powerhouses as guards!"

The galaxy-level powerhouse who was guarding here was stunned for a moment.

He is also a galaxy-level powerhouse, and he feels that Jin Chen Zhenjun's aura is much stronger than him, and his strength is estimated to be much stronger than him.

Such a galaxy-level powerhouse is definitely one of the powerhouses in the disk domain, and he has become Ye Tian's guard.

"His Royal Highness Wanfa has entered the supreme hall of the human race, and his status must be extraordinary!"

The galaxy-level powerhouse of the undead legion is in the dark way.

Ye Tian walked out of the teleportation stone gate, did not stay here, and left directly.

The galaxy-level powerhouse of the Undead Legion also passed the news to his superiors, and this news was quickly passed on to the ears of the Undead Lord.

Undead Legion, Headquarters.

The Immortal Army Master received the message about Ye Tian and was immediately shocked.

"How !!is it possible that His Highness Wanfa actually has one galaxy-level guard and ten god-level guards?"

The Undead Lord was surprised.

Others don't know about the supreme temple of the human race, but he does!

As a former highness of the Terran Supreme Palace, he can know the situation in the yellow-level area of the Terran Supreme Palace, and it is impossible for ordinary highnesses to travel without an escort.

"His Highness Wanfa has a galaxy-level guard, it is difficult for him to ......"

The Undead Warlord thought of a possibility.

That is, His Highness Wanfa has become the son of the eternal level universe!

But if you think about it carefully, how long has it been since His Highness Wanfa became the son of the universe, and how long has it been since he joined the Supreme Hall of the Human Race?

Even though Ye Tian's talent was very strong, it was almost unrealistic to want to become a son of the Eternal Universe in such a short period of time, at least he had never seen such a demonic Highness.

Of course, there is also a possibility, that is, His Highness Wanfa hired a galaxy-level powerhouse and ten great god-level as his guards, although the price was very high, but one Highness could still afford such a price.

"Contact the Terran Supreme Hall and ask!"

He also has a position in the Supreme Hall of the Terran Race, although it is not a very high position, but with the strength of his cosmic god, it is no problem to contact his old friends in the inner hall of the Supreme Hall of the Terran Race.

Immediately.

The Undead Master tried to contact the old friend with a teleportation device.

After a long time, an illusory figure suddenly descended on the domain.

This is a positioning projection that only the gods of the universe can master, and it can span many star fields.

Of course, this requires preparation time.

"Immortal Lord, you haven't contacted me for a long time, why did you suddenly contact me?"

The cosmic god said with a smile.

"Lord Changyun, I'm looking for you to catch up on the old days, and by the way, ask about the situation. The Undead Lord asked.

"Oh, what do you ask?" the Lord of Fortune wondered.

"Your Highness Wanfa, do you know this person?"

The Undead Lord asked tentatively.

"Your Highness Wanfa, it turns out that you asked this, if you contacted me a month ago, I really don't know you. But now I know, by the way, His Highness Wanfa is from the Domain, shouldn't it be Your Highness that you cultivated?"

"It's not that I cultivated it, it's just from the disk domain, and now he happens to be back, so I ask you, how is he in the yellow-level area?

The undead warlord felt that his conjecture was true?

The Divine Lord of Changyun was also very surprised: "His Highness Wanfa is already a Constant Ancient Highness, in fact, when I knew the news, I was also very shocked, his growth rate was too fast, and what he cultivated was the most powerful Supreme Divine Canon of the Supreme Hall of the Human Race, and he had already practiced to the realm of Xiaocheng." Now, the high-level leaders of the Supreme Hall of the Human Race are very optimistic about His Highness Wanfa, and it is even rumored that there are supreme beings who pay attention to His Highness Wanfa. In addition, he is now the envoy of the town, second only to you, so don't deliberately offend him. His future is limitless, otherwise you will suffer!"

"Changyun Divine Lord, His Highness Wanfa's cultivation talent is above the Yu level, if it is not above the Yu level, no matter how strong the combat power is, it will only be of great help to the human race now, and it can make a name for the human race, but it can't threaten me to wait!"

The Divine Lord of Changyun hurriedly said: "Immortal Army Master, you left the Supreme Hall of the Human Race when you were at the god level, and you know too little about the Supreme Hall of the Human Race, to tell you the truth, as long as the Supreme Hall of the Human Race pays a big price, even if the cultivation talent of His Royal Highness of Ten Thousand Laws is low, he can still be forcibly promoted." Moreover, the Eternal Rank Son of the Universe has never had a cultivation talent lower than the Universe level, this is actually a secret, you just don't know. "

"What!"

The undead warlord was shocked.

His Highness below the Universe level cultivation talent could not become the son of the Eternal Universe, and he really didn't know this secret.

In this way, His Highness Wanfa's cultivation talent is above the universe level, and the lowest achievement is also the cosmic god.

An ancient-level cosmic god, how terrifying it is, it's easy enough to kill him in seconds!

"You must not offend His Highness Wanfa!"

The undead army lord said secretly in his heart.

Immediately, the Immortal Army Lord and the Changyun Divine Lord chatted for a long time, and did not mention Ye Tian of His Highness Wanfa again.

......

Disks.

A spaceship is speeding through the starry sky.

This spaceship is Ye Tian's six-star spaceship, but after fusing with the medium-grade space artifact Ziling Shenshuo, its speed and defense are comparable to that of a seven-star spaceship.

Such a ship is fast in the river system, and it will not be long before it reaches the galaxy.

"Your Highness Wanfa, where are we going next?"

Jin Jin Zhenjun asked.

"Take a trip to my home galaxy, stay a few days before leaving!"

Ye Tian said.

In less than a day, Ye Tian returned to the Milky Way.

Yinyu Xing, Qin Feng Giant City.

Ye Tian returned here and came to the place where he lived.

"Not here!"

Ye Tian's copying talent did not sense the existence of the Moon Emperor, and the Moon Emperor was not here.

"It's time to go back to Earth!"

Ye Tian guessed.

Although it was good to cultivate in Yinyu Xing, in the days when he was not here, the Moon Emperor would definitely return to Earth often.

"Go to Earth!"

Ye Tian left.

Soon, they arrived in the solar system.

At this time, the solar system is very different from the past, many uninhabited planets here have been converted into small bases, and many space ports have been built on Earth.

But.

When Ye Tian descended on the solar system, he obviously sensed that the atmosphere here was different.

"Your Highness Wanfa, there seems to be some trouble on the earth!"

Jin Chen Zhenjun said.

"Trouble?" Ye Tian frowned.

The solar system is his territory, and he is the highness of the supreme temple of the human race, even if the forces of the galaxy do not know what his highness is, but the news that he has become the son of the universe should spread throughout the galaxy, who dares to offend a galaxy.

"Your Highness Wanfa, come and see for yourself!"

Jin Chen Zhenjun waved his hand, and the picture of the earth was displayed.

I saw that in the Kunlun Mountains of the earth, the two sides were facing each other.

One of them is the Moon Emperor, while the other is very unfamiliar.

"Your Highness Wanfa, there is a great god-level powerhouse on the earth, and it should not be the great god-level of the earth. This great god-level used an artifact to resist the power of the earth's world, it should be an alien great god-level!" Jin Chen Zhenjun said.

"Enter the Earth now!"

Ye Tian was annoyed.

The earth is his hole card, and a mere god-level dares to be so presumptuous, directly entering the earth, and he has a conflict with his wife and others, is this looking for death?

Earth.

Kunlun Mountains.

The Moon Emperor and the native gods and emperors of the earth confronted a small group of people.

The one at the head is a great god-level - the Great God of Fire Ghosts!

And behind the Yan Ghost God are the three Tianjiao and dozens of eight or nine star emperors.

"The Great God of Fire Ghosts, you are a great god-level powerhouse, it is not appropriate to break into the earth like this, you should know who the ball and the solar system belong to?"

The Moon Emperor said coldly.

The Great God of the Flame Ghost smiled and said, "Of course I know that the earth belongs to the territory of Ye Tian, the son of the universe, and the name of the son of the universe is indeed loud, but he is only at the emperor level now, maybe he will fall one day." Besides, I haven't violated any rules, why shouldn't I enter the earth with my god-level status? I don't want much, I just need this area of the Kunlun Mountains! If you know each other, give it to me, otherwise don't blame me for being rude!"

"Do you dare to kill me?"

The Moon Emperor's eyes widened and he glared at each other.

"You are the wife of Ye Tian, the son of the universe, I don't dare to kill you, but if I want to kill other warriors on the earth, no one can sanction me. If you don't want the earth to die, you'd better retreat!"

The Great God of Fire Ghosts threatened.

"You ......"

The Moon Emperor was furious.

She had heard of the Great God of Fire, ranked thirteenth among the great god-level powerhouses in the galaxy, and his status in the galaxy was very high, and there was a top power behind him.

It stands to reason that such a big man will not come to Earth.

Unexpectedly, some time ago, a flash of light flashed in the Kunlun Mountains, and a trace of chaotic vitality leaked out.

I don't know how it leaked out, the fire ghost god is here!

The earth rejects powerhouses above the god level, but there is no way to exclude a top god.

A top god of the Great God of the Flame Ghost Hall actually forcibly broke into the earth, apparently to spy on the secrets of the Kunlun Mountains.

But in fact, she doesn't know what the secrets of the Kunlun Mountains are.

She only knew that the Yan Ghost God had been in the Kunlun Mountains for some days, and when she got the news, she hurriedly rushed back, but unfortunately the other party was not afraid of the identity of her husband Ye Tian at all, and still wanted to forcibly occupy the Kunlun Mountain Range.

Suddenly.

A voice came.

"Who dares to say that we will destroy the human race on Earth?"
